name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-cis

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-cis
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Cis SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Cis SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-cis
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common cis
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.cis.v20180408.models.DescribeContainerInstancesRequest.__init__
documentation:
> ```
> param _Offset
>
> 偏移量，默认为0
>
> type Offset
>
> int
>
> param _Limit
>
> 返回数量，默认为10
>
> type Limit
>
> int
>
> param _Filters
>
> 过滤条件。
> ```

- Zone - String - 是否必填：否 -（过滤条件）按照可用区过滤。
- VpcId - String - 是否必填：否 -（过滤条件）按照VpcId过滤。
- InstanceName - String - 是否必填：否 -（过滤条件）按照容器实例名称做模糊查询。
  : ```
    type Filters

    list of Filter
    ```

methods.name: tencentcloud.cis.v20180408.models.DescribeContainerInstancesRequest.Filters
documentation:
过滤条件。
\- Zone - String - 是否必填：否 -（过滤条件）按照可用区过滤。
\- VpcId - String - 是否必填：否 -（过滤条件）按照VpcId过滤。
